user_prompt: Draft a response to a customer asking why their feature request from 6 months ago is still open.
actual_output:
**Priority:** MEDIUM
**Category:** Feature Request

**Draft response:**

Hi [Customer Name],

Thank you for reaching out and checking in on this! I completely understand why you're asking—waiting six months for an update on a feature you'd love to see is definitely frustrating. 

Your feature request is still open because our product team is actively keeping track of it. While they haven't been able to build it yet due to prioritizing some core system updates over the last few months, it is still very much on our radar. We keep these requests open so we can track community interest and notify you the moment there is movement on it.

I know that doesn't give you a concrete timeline, and I'm sorry I can't provide an exact date for when it might be released. 

In the meantime, I'd love to help if I can. Could you share a bit more about the specific workflow you are trying to achieve? There might be a workaround or an existing feature we can use to get you the same result right now. 

Thank you again for your patience and for helping us improve the product. Let me know if you'd like to explore some workarounds!

Best,

Compass
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed its instructions perfectly by drafting a professional, empathetic response to the customer's inquiry while adhering to the specified communication style and persona.
